family.translate: семья, семейство, род, содружество, семейный, фамильный, родовой
mnemonic: family [фэ'мили] семья - Эта семья (фэмили-ю) имеет странную.

examples.eng: Ours is a large family.
in the bosom of the family
The family lives in wealth.
My family comes first.
examples.ru: Для меня семья на первом месте.

examples.eng: The family is very posh.
Please consider your family.
examples.ru: Пожалуйста, отнеситесь с уважением к своей семье.

examples.eng: She is in the family way.
My family comes from Ireland.
The family now live in London.
examples.ru: Сейчас эта семья живёт в Лондоне.

examples.eng: She is from a very wealthy family.
He comes from a good family.
She came from a poor family.
She's a friend of the family.
We are friends of the family.
I can see the family likeness.
The family purchased a new car.
a member of the imperial family
His family rejoiced at the news.
examples.ru: Его семья обрадовалась этой новости. / Эта новость обрадовала его родных.

examples.eng: He became a burden to his family.
examples.ru: Он стал обузой для своей семьи.

examples.eng: She comes of a good family.
She missed her family badly.
examples.ru: Она очень сильно скучала по своей семье.

examples.eng: He put her in the family way.
My family winters in Florida.
The family lives off welfare.
He comes of a worker's family.
She alone sustained her family.
examples.ru: Она в одиночку обеспечивала свою семью.

examples.eng: He was lonesome for his family.
The family patronizes the arts.
The family is falling to pieces.
The land returned to the family.
